name: Farm Style Ribs
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the onion and cook in oil until transparent.
2. Add the ribs to the pan and brown on all sides.
3. Place the cooked ribs and onions in a microwavable casserole or oven-proof pan.
4. Heat the barbecue sauce with juices from the onions and ribs in the pan.
5. Pour the sauce mixture over the ribs.
6. Cover the pan with plastic wrap or foil (depending on cooking method).
7. Microwave on high for 15 minutes.
8. Check tenderness of the ribs using a knife. If necessary, cook longer or bake at 350°F for 45-60 minutes.
